channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Iran Approval Remains Low Despite Emerging Tentative Deal, AP-NORC Poll Shows
item.description: Most Americans still disapprove of President Trump's handling of Iran, while his overall approval rating remains stable, according to a new poll.

item.title: Essex Files: Danhausen's Smart Evasion Shows Why Performers Should Stay in Their Lane
FBI Raids LA Skid Row Over Suspected Voter Fraud and Bribery of Homeless Individuals
Senator Urges FAA to Resist Trump Pressure on Arch Approval
item.description: Sen. Tammy Duckworth wrote to the FAA head on Thursday, urging her to reject any pressure from President Trump regarding the Arch approval process.
